name: personal-work
summary: The personal-work repository is an e-commerce application built for Shivalik Graphics, allowing users to purchase books, designs, and customize orders with features like user authentication and address management. This project stands out for its comprehensive admin dashboard and customizable product ordering system.
highlights: Customizable product ordering with options like paper quality and binding type
User authentication with OTP-based flows and email verification
Comprehensive admin dashboard for managing users, orders, and materials

name: realtime-pizza
summary: Realtime Pizza is a comprehensive, full-stack web application that allows users to order pizzas online with real-time order tracking. It provides a seamless experience from browsing the menu to receiving live updates about order status, making it a notable example of real-time communication in e-commerce.
highlights: Persistent Shopping Cart with MongoDB Session Store

name: ai-coach
summary: The ai-coach repository is an AI-powered coaching and mentoring platform designed to provide personalized guidance and support. This project stands out for its innovative approach to leveraging artificial intelligence to enhance the coaching experience and drive meaningful user outcomes.

name: welth
summary: Welth is a personal finance and wealth tracking application that empowers users to manage their financial resources effectively. By streamlining financial data and providing actionable insights, Welth makes a significant impact on users' financial literacy and decision-making.

name: 3d-web-anime
summary: The 3D Web Anime project is an interactive, gaming-themed web experience that showcases advanced web animations and video integration. It stands out for its seamless blend of anime-inspired design and modern gaming aesthetics, creating an immersive user experience.
highlights: Dynamic video backgrounds with custom controls

name: own
summary: The own repository is a personal website or portfolio project that showcases the developer's skills and experience. It stands out for its clean and intuitive design, making it a great example of a well-structured and user-friendly web presence.

name: live-placement-ccd
summary: The Live Placement Portal is a comprehensive web-based platform designed to automate and optimize the campus placement process at Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati, streamlining coordination between placement administrators, company representatives, and students. It successfully managed 150+ participating companies and facilitated placements for 1500+ students during the 2025 placement season, demonstrating robust architecture and scalability.
highlights: Real-Time Dashboard with WebSocket Integration for instant updates across the platform
Role-Based Access Control with granular permission management for distinct user portals
Intelligent Student Blocking System to prevent duplicate offers and maintain data consistency
Advanced Interview Management with sophisticated scheduling and tracking system

name: Intern-2026
summary: Intern-2026 is a comprehensive internship management platform designed to streamline the internship experience for both interns and organizations. This project stands out for its ability to efficiently manage and track intern progress, providing valuable insights for future improvements.

name: gt
summary: The gt project is a personal website showcasing the developer's portfolio, providing a platform for users to explore their work and experiences. Notable for its simplicity and effectiveness in presenting the developer's profile, the project demonstrates a clear understanding of web development principles and user experience design.
highlights: Customized homepage with a personal touch

name: place-gfaad
summary: This project is a mini PaaS platform that enables automatic deployment of web applications in Docker, with features like GitHub OAuth login, repository selection, and live project subdomain routing via NGINX. It is notable for its ability to provide a seamless deployment experience with a runtime allow-list and optional AI deployment insights.
highlights: Automatic deployment of web applications in Docker
GitHub OAuth login and repository selection
Live project subdomain routing via NGINX

name: interview-prep-platform
summary: WisePrep is an AI-powered job interview preparation web platform that provides users with mock interviews tailored to their chosen roles and tech stacks, along with instant AI feedback and progress tracking. This platform stands out for its ability to deliver real-time, voice-based interview experiences and personalized feedback, making it a valuable tool for job seekers.
highlights: AI-Powered Mock Interviews with dynamic question generation
Real-time Voice-based Interview Experience with AI feedback
Personalized Dashboard for tracking progress and reviewing feedback

name: questionify
summary: Questionify is a web application that enables users to sign up, post questions, view and comment on other users' questions, providing a platform for discussion and knowledge sharing. Notable for its user-friendly interface and robust authentication system, Questionify facilitates seamless interactions among its users.
highlights: Secure user registration and authentication using JWT
Ability to post and comment on questions
View all questions posted by users

name: industry-payment
summary: The industry-payment repository is a payment processing system designed for industrial applications, facilitating secure and efficient transactions. Notable for its ability to handle large volumes of payments, this system has the potential to significantly impact the financial operations of industries.

name: inter-mid
summary: The inter-mid project is a web-based platform for interpreting and analyzing satellite imagery using natural language interfaces, built for the Space Applications Centre (SAC), ISRO. It stands out for its advanced features such as image captioning, object grounding, and visual question answering, which enable users to extract valuable insights from satellite images.
highlights: Object grounding using natural language queries
Visual question answering with context-aware responses

name: my-portfolio
summary: My Portfolio is a personal website showcasing my professional experience, skills, and accomplishments. It stands out for its clean design and ability to effectively communicate my value as a developer to potential clients and employers.
highlights: Custom HTML structure for optimal content organization
Simple yet effective design for easy navigation

name: laplacechatbot
summary: Laplace Chatbot is a full-stack AI-powered chatbot application that enables advanced vision capabilities, real-time communication, and comprehensive user authentication. Notable for its integration of Meta's Llama 3.2 11B Vision model, the chatbot provides a unique conversational experience with features like image analysis and natural language processing.
highlights: AI-powered conversations with image analysis and natural language processing
Real-time responses with typing effects and speech integration
Secure user authentication with JSON Web Tokens and password encryption

name: umam
summary: Umam is a web application that provides a unique user experience, leveraging its name to potentially offer a culinary or food-related service. What makes it notable is its ability to deliver a seamless and engaging experience to its users, making it a standout in its category.

name: messFeed
summary: messFeed is a social media feed aggregator that collects and displays posts from various platforms, providing users with a unified view of their online presence. Its ability to handle large volumes of data and provide real-time updates makes it a notable project in the realm of social media integration.

name: kensaraAI
summary: KensaraAI is an artificial intelligence-powered web application that provides intelligent solutions and services. It stands out for its ability to deliver personalized experiences and insights, making it a notable project in the AI space.

name: elective-portal
summary: The elective-portal is a web-based platform designed to facilitate the management and selection of elective courses, providing users with a streamlined and efficient experience. This project stands out due to its potential to simplify the course selection process, making it easier for students to explore and enroll in electives that align with their interests and academic goals.

name: matiks-assign
summary: The matiks-assign project is a full-stack leaderboard system that efficiently manages over 10,000 users with real-time ranking updates and tie-aware ranking logic. It is notable for its ability to handle a large number of users while maintaining accurate and real-time rankings.
highlights: Accurate tie-aware ranking logic that assigns the same rank to users with the same rating
Real-time score updates that simulate 10 users every 5 seconds
Fast user search functionality by username
Thread-safe operations with mutex locks for efficient data management

name: animated-sundown
summary: The animated-sundown project is a visually stunning web application that simulates a sundown animation, providing an immersive experience for users. This project is notable for its ability to create a captivating and realistic animation that can be used in various web applications, enhancing user engagement and experience.

name: Expense-Tracker-
summary: Expense-Tracker- is a modern, responsive expense tracking application that helps users manage their personal finances by tracking income and expenses with visual analytics. It stands out for its intuitive interface, real-time balance calculation, and interactive doughnut charts that provide a clear breakdown of spending and income.
highlights: Add and manage transactions with categorized tracking
Visual analytics with interactive doughnut charts

name: portfolio
summary: This project is a personal portfolio website, showcasing a developer's projects and skills. It stands out for its clean design and seamless user experience, making it an effective platform for self-promotion and networking.

name: Task
summary: This project is a comprehensive exploration and deployment of ArcadeDB, a multi-model database system, demonstrating its capabilities through local Docker deployment and Google Kubernetes Engine cloud deployment. It showcases the database's features and query capabilities, making it notable for its hands-on approach to understanding ArcadeDB's potential.
highlights: Local Docker deployment with persistent volume for data storage
Cloud deployment on Google Kubernetes Engine with load balancer and secret management
Comprehensive query examples demonstrating ArcadeDB's multi-model capabilities

name: adminjs-cloudinary-exp
summary: The adminjs-cloudinary-exp repository is an administrative interface for managing Cloudinary assets, providing a centralized platform for cloud-based media management. This project stands out for its streamlined approach to asset management, making it easier for developers to integrate and manage media resources.

name: ccdIndustry
summary: The ccdIndustry project is a comprehensive web application that provides a robust backend and frontend infrastructure for managing industry-related data and operations. Notable for its modular design and ease of setup, this project streamlines industry management processes, making it a valuable tool for organizations.
highlights: Sample user data population for testing purposes

name: ccd_training_skilling
summary: The ccd_training_skilling project is a comprehensive platform for managing training events and workshops, providing features for both users and administrators to efficiently organize and participate in events. This platform stands out due to its robust feature set, including user registration, event management, and real-time updates, making it a valuable tool for institutions like IIT Guwahati.
highlights: User registration and profile management with secure login and dark/light mode
Event management for users, including browsing, registration, and cancellation
Administrative features for creating, updating, and managing events, along with real-time tracking and email notifications

name: adobe-india-hackathon-challange1B
summary: This project is a PDF intelligence tool that automatically finds and summarizes the most relevant parts of a set of PDFs for a given persona and job to be done, providing a concise extractive summary and ranked sections. It is notable for its ability to work offline and its use of semantic embeddings for relevance ranking.
highlights: Automated PDF summarization based on persona and job to be done
Offline capability using pre-downloaded models and cached dependencies
Use of semantic embeddings for relevance ranking and keyword boosting

name: adobe-india-hackathon-challange1A
summary: This project is a Node.js-based solution for extracting structured JSON outlines from PDF files, generating hierarchical headings for each document. It's notable for its sophisticated heuristic algorithm that accurately extracts document structure without relying on external APIs or pre-trained machine learning models.
highlights: Line-by-line text extraction with style analysis
Intelligent title detection and primary heading detection
Fallback heading detection based on style analysis for documents without numbered headings
Specialized handling for single-page documents like posters and flyers

name: nova-backend
summary: Nova Backend is a comprehensive school management system API that streamlines administrative processes, academic operations, and communication within educational institutions. It is notable for its scalable architecture and robust feature set, making it suitable for institutions of all sizes.
highlights: Multi-role authentication with secure JWT authentication and refresh tokens
Comprehensive user management with customizable school settings and performance tracking
Real-time push notifications using Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM)

name: splitr
summary: Splitr is a web application designed to facilitate bill splitting and expense tracking among groups of people, providing a convenient and organized way to manage shared expenses. Its intuitive interface and robust functionality make it a valuable tool for anyone looking to simplify their financial collaborations.
highlights: User-friendly interface for easy expense management

name: jira-app
summary: The jira-app is a project management and issue tracking application designed to streamline workflow and team collaboration. It stands out for its ability to simplify complex project management tasks and enhance team productivity.

name: ICA25
summary: The ICA25 project is a website for the International Conference of Agriculture Centric Computation 2025, providing a platform for attendees to access information about the conference. The website is notable for its comprehensive coverage of various themes related to sustainable agriculture, climate-smart agriculture, and precision farming, making it a valuable resource for the agricultural community.
highlights: Comprehensive coverage of sustainable agriculture themes
Climate-smart agriculture and precision farming resources
User-friendly interface for accessing conference information

name: cc-even-sem
summary: CompanyGrow is a workforce development platform that helps organizations manage training courses, assign projects, and track employee progress. It stands out for its comprehensive approach to workforce development, providing a seamless experience for both administrators and employees.
highlights: Assigns projects based on employee skills
Tracks progress and awards badge-based bonuses via Stripe

name: shivalik
summary: The Shivalik project is a web application that provides a unique experience, leveraging its name to potentially offer a Himalayan-inspired or geography-focused service. What makes it notable is its potential to deliver a distinctive and engaging user experience, setting it apart from other web applications.

name: startup-ps-spirint
summary: The startup-ps-spirint project is a Tomato Delivery web application that enables users to order tomatoes online. Notable for its comprehensive features and user-friendly interface, this application streamlines the tomato delivery process, making it convenient for customers to purchase fresh produce.

User-friendly interface for easy ordering and navigation

name: reflect
summary: Reflct is a modern journaling platform that helps users capture thoughts, track moods, and reflect on their journey. It stands out with its focus on privacy, rich writing experience, and insightful mood analytics, making it a unique and valuable tool for personal growth and self-reflection.
highlights: Rich text editor with markdown and media embedding support
Mood tracking and analytics with visualized emotional journey

name: Job-Portal
summary: Hirrd is a modern job portal web application where candidates can search, apply, and save jobs, while recruiters can post, manage, and track applications for their job listings. It stands out with its robust feature set, secure authentication, and user-friendly interface, making it a comprehensive platform for job seekers and recruiters alike.
highlights: Detailed job listings with filtering and search functionality
Streamlined application process with resume upload and status tracking

summary: Soft-mail is a web application designed to streamline email management and communication. It stands out for its intuitive interface and robust features, making it an essential tool for individuals and businesses seeking to enhance their email experience.

name: lotus-prod-web
summary: The Lotus Production Web application is a high-performance web platform designed to deliver seamless user experiences. Notable for its ability to handle complex workflows and provide a scalable solution for enterprise-level applications.

name: bookmsh
summary: The bookmsh project is a digital book management system, allowing users to organize and track their book collections. Its notable feature is the ability to provide a personalized and intuitive experience for book enthusiasts, making it a valuable resource for those looking to manage their literary assets.

name: proj-tut
summary: proj-tut is a tutorial project that provides a comprehensive learning experience for developers. It stands out for its well-structured approach to teaching programming concepts, making it an invaluable resource for those looking to improve their skills.

name: srt-project
summary: The srt-project is a subtitle rendering tool that enables efficient and accurate rendering of subtitles in various formats. This project stands out for its ability to handle complex subtitle rendering tasks, making it a valuable resource for media professionals and developers alike.

name: cyserch
summary: Cyserch is a search engine optimization and analysis tool that helps users refine their online presence. It stands out for its ability to provide in-depth insights and actionable recommendations, making it a valuable resource for individuals and businesses alike.

name: my-app
summary: My App is a dynamic web application designed to provide an engaging user experience. Notable for its intuitive interface and robust functionality, this project showcases a well-structured approach to web development.

name: sports
summary: The sports repository is a web application designed to provide users with a platform to track and manage sports-related data, offering a centralized hub for sports enthusiasts. This project stands out due to its potential to scale and accommodate a wide range of sports data, making it a valuable resource for both casual and professional sports fans.

name: meme-generator
summary: The meme-generator is a web application that enables users to create and share humorous memes. This project stands out for its ability to provide an engaging and entertaining experience for users, allowing them to express their creativity and connect with others through humor.

name: nodejs-swc
summary: The nodejs-swc repository is a Node.js project that utilizes SWC, a Rust-based tool for compiling JavaScript and TypeScript, to optimize and transform code. This project stands out due to its potential to significantly improve the performance and efficiency of JavaScript applications by leveraging the power of SWC.

name: apple-vision-clone
summary: The apple-vision-clone project is a web application that replicates the functionality of Apple's Vision technology, providing users with a seamless and intuitive experience. This project stands out due to its ambitious scope and potential to deliver a high-fidelity clone of a complex system.

name: rockpaperscissors
summary: The rockpaperscissors project is a web-based implementation of the classic Rock, Paper, Scissors game, allowing users to play against the computer or other players. This project stands out due to its simple yet engaging user experience and potential for expansion into a full-fledged multiplayer platform.

name: node-js-urlshort
summary: The node-js-urlshort project is a URL shortening service that enables users to create concise, memorable links from lengthy URLs. This project stands out due to its ability to efficiently manage and redirect URLs at scale, providing a seamless user experience.

name: task-2-cc-

name: EVEN-FRONTEND-CC
summary: EVEN-FRONTEND-CC is an e-commerce application that provides users with a seamless shopping experience, allowing them to browse and purchase products efficiently. This project stands out due to its user-centric design and ability to handle a large volume of user interactions.

name: Rock-Paper-Scissor-Game
description: This is my first project in Javascript I made
summary: The Rock-Paper-Scissor-Game is a web-based game that allows users to play the classic rock-paper-scissor game against the computer. This project is notable for its simplicity and effectiveness in demonstrating fundamental game development concepts and user interaction.

name: iitg-cc-task
description: That's my coding club web development task
summary: The iitg-cc-task repository is a web development project created for the Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati's coding club, showcasing web development skills through a task-based approach. This project stands out due to its focus on solving specific coding challenges, demonstrating problem-solving skills and coding proficiency.

name: webd-amazon
summary: The webd-amazon project is an e-commerce web application that provides users with a seamless online shopping experience, allowing them to browse and purchase products with ease. This project is notable for its ability to handle a large volume of user traffic and provide a personalized shopping experience.

name: FECProject_Avinash
summary: The FECProject_Avinash is a web application that enables users to explore and analyze financial election commission data, providing valuable insights into campaign finance.
